name: The Hexblade
description: You draw power from a sentient shadow weapon or force from the Shadowfell.

1.name: Hexblade's Curse
1.description: Curse a target for bonus damage, criticals on 19-20, and healing on kill.

1.name: Hex Warrior
1.description: Gain martial weapon and medium armor proficiency; you may use Charisma for one chosen weapon.

1.name: Expanded Spell List
1.description: The Hexblade adds martial shadow magic spells to your options.

6.name: Accursed Specter
6.description: When you slay a humanoid, you can raise its spirit as a specter.

10.name: Armor of Hexes
10.description: Your cursed target's attacks can miss you on a 4+ roll.

14.name: Master of Hexes
14.description: Transfer your Hexblade's Curse to a new target when the current one dies.
